description: Add refresh-token rotation helper that invalidates the old token on use
acceptance: rotateRefreshToken(oldToken) returns a new token and marks oldToken as revoked
Reusing a revoked token throws RevokedTokenError
Unit tests cover happy path, revoked replay, and expired token
POST /auth/refresh returns 200 with a new {access, refresh} pair
Replaying an old refresh token returns 401 with code=TOKEN_REVOKED
Existing e2e auth suite still passes

description: Show 'Session expired - please sign in again' toast when /auth/refresh returns TOKEN_REVOKED
acceptance: On 401 TOKEN_REVOKED, the auth store clears and a toast appears
User is redirected to /login after the toast
Manual smoke via dev server confirms the flow
